title: Postpartum hair shedding
excerpt: Why telogen effluvium happens after birth, nutrition support, gentle hair care, and when to check thyroid or iron.
content:
## Mechanism

Hair cycles shift during pregnancy; after birth many hairs enter shedding phase at once — usually temporary.

## Nutrition

- Adequate protein, iron, zinc, biotin from varied diet.
- Continue prenatal or postnatal vitamins if prescribed.
- Treat anemia if diagnosed.

## Hair care

Gentle brushing, avoid tight ponytails and harsh chemical treatments while fragile.

## When to see a doctor

Patchy bald spots, scalp inflammation, or shedding beyond 12 months — check thyroid, iron, and hormones.
